# External ADK Workflow Samples Catalog

Structured records live in `workflow-catalog.yaml`.

This catalog indexes ADK 2.0 Workflow samples from
`https://github.com/google/adk-python/tree/v2/contributing/workflow_samples`.

Use the YAML file as the source of truth for workflow sample IDs, sources,
summaries, tags, and maturity. This Markdown file intentionally does not
duplicate item records.
